vol_name: The Role of Age, Theory of Mind, and Linguistic Ability in Children's Understanding of Ownership
vol_description:
- Participants exact age (in years)
- Ownership composite score, made up of responses to 4 serial possession, 4 gift-giving, 4 control of permission, and 4 stealing tasks. 
- Theory of mind composite score, made up of 11 theory of mind tasks. 
- KBIT-2 standardized score

Videos of four different property transfer scenarios (serial possession, gift giving, control of permission, stealing) shown in "The Role of Age, Theory of Mind, and Linguistic Ability in Children's Understanding of Ownership" study.

vol_name: Exploring the first possessor bias in children
vol_description: Data collected across two experiments exploring the first possessor bias across a variety of transfer types in children (ages 7-10).

vol_name: Exploring the first possessor bias in children
vol_description: This volume includes collected data, visual stimuli, protocols, item descriptions, and test items.
